accounts.name: cursor
accounts._comment: Admin API: api_key from team settings. 'email' for personal spend. 'included_usage/included_limit' are optional static values (not from API).

accounts.name: cursor (session)
accounts._comment: Session cookie approach: set session_token to WorkosCursorSessionToken value from browser DevTools.

accounts.name: openai
accounts._comment: Requires Admin key from platform.openai.com/settings/organization/admin-keys. 'budget' is optional (dashboard limit, not from API). 'billing_day' defaults to 1.
